nasb.text: The battle went heavily against Saul, and the archers hit him; and he was badly wounded by the archers.

esv.text: The battle pressed hard against Saul, and the archers found him, and he was badly wounded by the archers.

cnv.text: 戰爭激烈，掃羅受到猛烈的攻擊，弓箭手發現了他，射箭的人射中了他，他的傷勢嚴重；

ccb.text: 扫罗周围战事激烈，他被弓箭手发现、射成重伤，
